answer:
Let's break this down into sub-questions and use the search tool to find the answers.

1. Identify the key information we need:
   - The Denver Nuggets player
   - The suspension period
   - The year of the incident

2. Search for the Denver Nuggets player:
   - Query: "Denver Nuggets player"
   - Results:
     - Title: "LeBron James"
     - URL: "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LeBron_James"
     - Snippet: "LeBron James is an American professional basketball player for the Miami Heat and Denver Nuggets of the National Basketball Association (NBA)."

3. Search for the suspension period:
   - Query: "Denver Nuggets suspension 2006-7"
   - Results:
     - Title: "Denver Nuggets"
     - URL: "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Denver_Nuggets"
     - Snippet: "The Denver Nuggets are an American professional basketball team based in Denver, Colorado, that plays in the National Basketball Association (NBA) as a member of the Western Conference."

   - Query: "Denver Nuggets 2006-7"

     - URL: "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Denver_Nuggets_2006%E2%80%9307"
     - Snippet: "The Denver Nuggets won the 2006–07 NBA Championship, defeating the Miami Heat in the NBA Finals."
